description_long: This is a handheld digital multimeter, commonly used for measuring electrical values such as voltage, current, and resistance. The device features a rectangular body with a protective orange rubberized casing, providing durability and grip. The front panel is dominated by a large digital LCD display at the top, which shows measurement readings. Below the display is a rotary selector dial surrounded by various measurement settings, clearly labeled with white text and symbols. Several input jacks and buttons are located at the bottom of the front face, color-coded for different functions. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for use in workshops, garages, or on-site electrical work.
description: A compact handheld digital multimeter with an orange rubber casing, large LCD display, rotary selector dial, and multiple input jacks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, rotary selector dial, and input jacks clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the orange casing and the flatness of the device.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view with the LCD display and selector dial visible, showing the device's depth.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the orange casing and the arrangement of the front panel controls.
